title: 确认物流方式和运费
theme: 从 courier / air freight / sea freight 开始
goals: 能向客户解释快递、空运和海运的区别
能收集收货地址、目的港和货代信息，用于确认运费
能在客户催发货时，说明跟踪单号、清关和预计运输时间

review.title: Day 05 复习
items: 昨天练了 packaging、carton size、gross weight、net weight 和 shipping mark。
今天继续出货前的下一步：选择物流方式、确认运费、收集地址和货代信息。
客户问 shipping cost 时，先确认物流方式和收货信息，再给准确费用。

preview.scenario: 客户已经确认包装和订单细节，现在询问用快递、空运还是海运，以及运费、运输时间和跟踪信息。
needToKnow: courier 适合样品或小货，例如 DHL、FedEx、UPS。
air freight 比海运快，但通常费用更高，适合赶时间的大货。
sea freight 适合大货，费用低一些，但运输时间更长，还要确认目的港和清关安排。

vocabulary.usage: 用于 DHL、FedEx、UPS 等门到门快递服务。
vocabulary.example: For samples, courier is usually faster and easier.

vocabulary.usage: 用于较急的大货运输，速度快但费用较高。
vocabulary.example: Air freight is faster, but the cost is higher.

vocabulary.usage: 用于大货运输，费用较低但时间更长。
vocabulary.example: Sea freight is more economical for bulk orders.

vocabulary.usage: 客户选择海运时，用来确认货物到达港口。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm the destination port so we can check the sea freight cost.

vocabulary.usage: 用于快递或物流发出后提供查询信息。
vocabulary.example: I will send you the tracking number after shipment.

vocabulary.usage: 用于进口环节，说明客户或货代需要处理清关。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm who will handle customs clearance at your side.

vocabulary.usage: 用于确认快递或门到门运输的具体地址。
vocabulary.example: Please send us the delivery address so we can check the courier cost.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户指定自己的物流代理或货运公司。
vocabulary.example: If you have your own freight forwarder, please send us their contact information.

sentences.label: 询问物流方式
sentences.natural: Which shipping method do you prefer?
sentences.business: Could you please confirm if you prefer courier, air freight, or sea freight?

sentences.label: 确认快递地址
sentences.natural: Please send us your delivery address.
sentences.business: Please send us your delivery address so we can check the courier cost for you.

sentences.label: 说明空运
sentences.natural: Air freight is faster, but the cost is higher.
sentences.business: Air freight is faster than sea freight, but the shipping cost will be higher.

sentences.label: 说明海运
sentences.natural: Sea freight is more economical for bulk orders.
sentences.business: Sea freight is more economical for bulk orders, but the transit time will be longer.

sentences.label: 提供跟踪单号
sentences.natural: I will send you the tracking number after shipment.
sentences.business: After the goods are shipped, I will send you the tracking number and keep you updated.

chatAnalysis.problem: 如果没有地址、重量和物流方式，很难给准确运费。
chatAnalysis.better: Please send us your delivery address so we can check the courier cost.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please confirm the shipping method and delivery address, and I will check the accurate freight cost for you.

chatAnalysis.problem: 只说便宜不够完整，客户还需要知道时间更长。
chatAnalysis.better: Sea freight is more economical for bulk orders.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Sea freight is more economical for bulk orders, but the transit time will be longer than air freight.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太短，客户不知道什么时候发货、什么时候能查。
chatAnalysis.better: I will send you the tracking number after shipment.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: After the goods are shipped, I will send you the tracking number and keep you updated.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：确认快递地址

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you check the courier cost?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Please send us your delivery address so we can check the courier cost.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Is courier good for samples?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. For samples, courier is usually faster and easier.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：比较空运和海运

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Should we ship by air or by sea?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Air freight is faster, but the cost is higher. Sea freight is more economical, but the transit time is longer.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need the goods urgently.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: In that case, air freight may be better. I can check the air freight cost for you.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户指定货代

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We want to use our own freight forwarder.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. Please send us your freight forwarder's contact information.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can your factory contact them directly?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. After receiving their contact information, we will coordinate the pickup details with them.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：从物流方式到运费、货代和跟踪单号

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, can you help us check the shipping cost?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Could you please confirm the shipping method you prefer?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What options do we have?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: You can choose courier, air freight, or sea freight.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Which one is best for samples?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: For samples, courier is usually faster and easier.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please check the courier cost first.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. Please send us your delivery address so we can check the courier cost.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: For the bulk order, we may ship by sea.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sea freight is more economical for bulk orders, but the transit time will be longer.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What information do you need for sea freight?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please confirm the destination port and whether you have your own freight forwarder.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Our destination port is Los Angeles.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Got it. I will check the sea freight cost to Los Angeles for you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you also check air freight?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will compare air freight and sea freight for you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need the goods before the end of next month.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Then air freight may be safer for the schedule, but I will check both options.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Do we need to handle customs clearance?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If you use your own freight forwarder, please confirm who will handle customs clearance at your side.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We have a freight forwarder in China.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Great. Please send us their contact information and pickup address.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can your factory deliver the goods to their warehouse?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we can deliver the goods to their warehouse. I will check the local delivery cost if needed.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: After shipment, can you send the tracking number?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. After the goods are shipped, I will send you the tracking number and keep you updated.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please send all shipping options today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will check courier, air freight, and sea freight, then update you today.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：请确认你想用快递、空运还是海运。
exercises.answer: Please confirm if you prefer courier, air freight, or sea freight.
acceptable: please confirm if you prefer courier air freight or sea freight
could you please confirm if you prefer courier air freight or sea freight
exercises.hint: 快递 courier，空运 air freight，海运 sea freight。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：sea cheaper
exercises.answer: Sea freight is more economical for bulk orders.
acceptable: sea freight is more economical for bulk orders
sea freight is cheaper for bulk orders
exercises.hint: more economical 比 cheaper 更商务。

exercises.prompt: 填空：Please send us your delivery ____ so we can check the courier cost.
exercises.hint: delivery address 表示收货地址。

exercises.prompt: 客户说 We want to use our own freight forwarder. 哪个回复更适合？
options: No problem. Please send us your freight forwarder's contact information.
exercises.answer: No problem. Please send us your freight forwarder's contact information.
acceptable: no problem please send us your freight forwarders contact information
exercises.hint: 确认可以，并要求货代联系方式。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：发货后，我会把跟踪单号发给你。
exercises.answer: After shipment, I will send you the tracking number.
acceptable: after shipment i will send you the tracking number
after the goods are shipped i will send you the tracking number
exercises.hint: tracking number 表示跟踪单号。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Should we ship by air or by sea? 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: Air freight is faster, but the cost is higher. Sea freight is more economical, but the transit time is longer.
acceptable: air freight is faster but the cost is higher sea freight is more economical but the transit time is longer
air freight is faster but more expensive sea freight is more economical but takes longer
exercises.hint: 比较速度、费用和运输时间。

homework: 把 courier、air freight、sea freight、destination port、tracking number 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍。
跟读长对话 2 遍，重点练物流方式比较和货代沟通。
tomorrow: Day 7 会练生产进度、出货时间和延误解释。
